message:
wa-2l9kn: add cass_search_ops criterion bench suite and register it in Cargo.toml

New criterion benchmark suite covering the cass (session search)
integration hot paths so the wa-2l9kn perf budget can be enforced
in CI.

crates/frankenterm-core/Cargo.toml:
* Add a new `[[bench]]` table:
  - `name = "cass_search_ops"`
  - `harness = false`
  adjacent to the existing `quota_cost_ops` bench entry. Keeps the
  suite under the same `benches/` layout as the others.

crates/frankenterm-core/benches/cass_search_ops.rs (new, ~313 LOC):
* Imports the cass session-search surface via
  `frankenterm_core::cass::{ CassAgent, CassMessage, CassSearchHit,
   CassSearchResult, CassSession, CassSessionSummary, CassStatus,
   parse_cass_timestamp_ms }`.
* Uses the shared `bench_common` module for budget / baseline hooks.
* Advertises four budget entries via the shared bench_common
  `BenchBudget` table so the bench runner can emit a single
  machine-readable summary:
    - `cass_search_ops/search_result_deser`: "CassSearchResult deser
      <500µs for 200-hit payload"
    - `cass_search_ops/timestamp_parse`: "parse_cass_timestamp_ms
      <100ns per call"
    - plus the hit-hint-formatting and CassSession summary
      throughput budgets covered below.
* Bench coverage:
    - CassSearchResult JSON deserialization for varying hit counts
      (10, 50, 200) — the "search result deser" group, each hit
      count a `BenchmarkId` row.
    - `parse_cass_timestamp_ms` throughput on the three accepted
      inputs: epoch-ms, epoch-s, and RFC3339 — isolates the parser
      fast paths from the JSON-deser overhead.
    - CassSearchHit hint formatting throughput — exercises the
      format-to-operator surface.
    - CassSession summary computation — the "aggregate these
      messages into a CassSessionSummary" op that mission-control
      invokes per search click.
    - A serde roundtrip bench for search result payloads so
      regressions in either direction are visible.
* `black_box` imports from `std::hint::black_box` per the bench-suite
  convention in this repo.

No production code changes; this is purely a new bench target
behind the standard `cargo bench -p frankenterm-core --bench
cass_search_ops` invocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -453,6 +453,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "quota_cost_ops"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "cass_search_ops"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
